name: aie-europe-2026

tools.name: get_conference_info
tools.description: Get basic information about AI Engineer Europe 2026 including dates, location, venue, and links.

tools.name: list_speakers
tools.description: List all confirmed speakers with their roles, companies, social links, and talk details.

search.description: Optional search term to filter speakers by name, company, or role.

tools.name: list_sessions
tools.description: List all confirmed sessions (talks + workshops) with titles, descriptions, speakers, times, and rooms.

track.description: Optional track to filter by (e.g. "AI Agents", "Code", "Open Source").

search.description: Optional search term to filter sessions by title or speaker name.

tools.name: get_schedule
tools.description: Get the full conference schedule organized by day.

description: MCP server for AI Engineer Europe 2026 conference data. Send JSON-RPC requests via POST.
